Tests for `Function.prototype` properties, immutability, and the `length` property of the `Function` object.

## Folders
- **[15.03.03.01](15.03.03.01/README.md)**: Tests for `Function.prototype` immutability, non-enumerability, deletion, and property definition.
- **[15.03.03.02](15.03.03.02/README.md)**: Tests the property descriptor of the "length" property of the Function object.

## Files
- **[15.03.03-001.js](15.03.03-001.js.md)**: Tests if the Function object has a "prototype" property.
- **[15.03.03-002.js](15.03.03-002.js.md)**: Tests if `Function.prototype` is the prototype of `Function`.
- **[15.03.03-003.js](15.03.03-003.js.md)**: Tests the addition of a custom property to the Function prototype and its verification.
- **[15.03.03-004.js](15.03.03-004.js.md)**: Tests the `length` property of the `Function` object in JavaScript.
